creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Error: Could not run:  Could not find type cron
This make me think you have not installed the cron_core puppet module.  It used to be part of core puppet, but was removed from Puppet 6.0.

I have a similar setup (Puppet 6.7.2 on FreeBSD 12.0-STABLE) and `puppet resource cron` is doing the right thing.

Strange thing however, AFAICR, when the module is not installed Puppet fails HARD :-/  Can you check that the module is installed?
